arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Farke sacked if Leeds stay down
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has two months to potentially save himself from being axed at Leeds United, with form putting promotion into a worrying position. Lee Hendrie: I wouldn’t be surprised if Leeds United sack Farke, should they not gain promotion

arts.ttl: Leeds Unites News: John Eustace to do a favour v Burnley?
arts.sum: As Leeds United face Middlesbrough tonight, their focus is on getting back to winning ways, but they will be hoping for dropped points for Sheffield United and Burnley in the meantime. John Eustace could finally do Leeds United promotion favour with Derby County win v Burnley

Charlton helped anchor Leeds’ legendary defence under Don Revie, ensuring the club collected two First Division titles, an FA Cup, and a League Cup, plus two Inter Cities Fairs Cups during his time at Elland Road. Bremner wasn’t just an icon of the club like any standout star – he was and still is Leeds United personified: fierce, passionate, and undeniably world-class.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough vs Leeds United LIVE: Updates and analysis from the Riverside
arts.sum: The latest from the Riverside as Michael Carrick's side look to strengthen their play-off position

arts.ttl: Ex-Aston Villa midfielder aims brutal swipe at Illan Meslier amid Leeds United promotion fear
arts.sum: Finishing in the Championship play-offs for the second year on the bounce would be a "huge physiological blow" for Leeds United in their quest to gain promotion. I'd seen him making mistakes with his feet and he's just that sort of goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke is lightning rod for Leeds criticism after comments on thorny issue
arts.sum: When asked whether he was as convinced that Leeds United could finish in a top two spot as he was that the club would be promoted, Daniel Farke stayed cautious. It’s why Farke claiming that Saturday’s draw as “a point gained” did not go down well with many supporters.

arts.ttl: Boro v Leeds United: Farke on “risky” Ramazani
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke was keen to address his Largie Ramazani omission pre-Middlesbrough, but his comments underline a quality this attack is currently lacking. A key question being put to Farke right now is why he’s witnessing his attacking quartet go through their worst spell of the season, but is still unwilling to even give Largie Ramazani a minute of action at Luton Town.

arts.ttl: Illan Meslier Leeds United transfer latest - England stars, Chelsea target and 'talks underway' - Leeds Live
arts.sum: The England international is unlikely to settle for a spot on the bench at St James' with a move to Leeds a potential avenue to explore, according to The Sun - especially if they gain promotion to the Premier League. Leeds have been linked with a number of goalkeepers in recent weeks, with Meslier's most recent errors costing the Whites' top spot in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Jeff Stelling on Leeds’ Burnley advantage
arts.sum: Leeds United have six games left to climb back into the automatic promotion places under Daniel Farke, starting with tonight’s trip to Middlesbrough. Stelling was in agreement with McCormack, reaffirming the idea that even with defeat to Middlesbrough tonight, it wouldn’t be game over for Leeds.

arts.ttl: Boro v Leeds United preview: Solomon must be axed
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has to find a solution to his stagnant attack tonight vs Middlesbrough, which could mean a spell on the bench for Manor Solomon . Farke’s press conference message to Largie Ramazani would indicate that the Belgian won’t be getting the nod over Solomon this week, but it does appear like time for some change on the left wing for Leeds.
